case_title: RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK VS. RODRICK FORD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF RETAILERS NATIONAL BANK SERVED JUL-05-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FORD, RODRICK
